title: satureja × nogalesii
intro: Satureja × nogalesii, also known as Nogales savory, is a hybrid plant species within the Lamiaceae family, resulting from the cross between Satureja montana and Clinopodium acinos. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and congestion. Satureja × nogalesii can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or dried herb for use in traditional medicine and culinary applications.
